name: alpha_001_quality_rev_revert
expr: add(group_rank(rank(add(add(ts_zscore(divide(cashflow_op, enterprise_value), 252), ts_zscore(divide(eps, close), 252)), ts_zscore(earnings_certainty_rank_derivative, 252))), subindustry), group_rank(rank(subtract(ts_mean(close, 5), close)), subindustry))

name: alpha_002_quality_analyst_revert
expr: add(group_rank(rank(add(add(ts_zscore(divide(cashflow_op, enterprise_value), 252), ts_zscore(divide(eps, close), 252)), ts_zscore(analyst_revision_rank_derivative, 252))), subindustry), group_rank(rank(subtract(ts_mean(close, 5), close)), subindustry))

name: alpha_003_profit_stability_revert
expr: add(group_rank(rank(add(subtract(ts_zscore(divide(cashflow_op, enterprise_value), 252), ts_zscore(ts_std_dev(divide(cashflow_op, enterprise_value), 126), 252)), ts_zscore(divide(eps, close), 252))), subindustry), group_rank(rank(subtract(ts_mean(close, 6), close)), subindustry))

name: alpha_004_fcf_eps_revert
expr: add(group_rank(rank(add(add(ts_zscore(divide(cashflow_op, enterprise_value), 252), ts_zscore(divide(ebitda, enterprise_value), 252)), ts_zscore(divide(eps, close), 252))), subindustry), group_rank(rank(subtract(ts_mean(close, 7), close)), subindustry))

name: alpha_005_efficiency_revert
expr: add(group_rank(rank(add(add(ts_zscore(divide(cashflow_op, enterprise_value), 252), ts_zscore(cashflow_efficiency_rank_derivative, 252)), ts_zscore(divide(eps, close), 252))), subindustry), group_rank(rank(subtract(ts_mean(close, 5), close)), subindustry))

name: alpha_006_value_quality_revert
expr: add(group_rank(rank(add(add(ts_zscore(divide(cashflow_op, enterprise_value), 252), ts_zscore(divide(est_netprofit, enterprise_value), 252)), ts_zscore(divide(eps, close), 252))), subindustry), group_rank(rank(subtract(ts_mean(close, 6), close)), subindustry))
